title: El Paso Heat Wave
lead: El Paso is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.91. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in El Paso has a Z-Score of +3.91, indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is 12.7 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 0.0 GG, highlighting the extreme heat. 
 The relative humidity is 11% and wind speed is 3.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
